programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Hillsong Kids: Cubbyhouse
programme.desc: An entertaining show for the little ones aged between 2 and 6, with songs, fun craft time, bible stories and animated teaching and illustrations.

programme.title: God Rocks! Playlist
programme.desc: Join kid-hosts Myles and Stella for a fun, non-stop musical playlist of hit songs about Faith and Trust!

programme.title: Hunter & Twerp Scripture Seekers
programme.desc: Welcome to the wonderful world of Brightington, home of Hunter and Twerp, Scripture Seekers! Stacks of fun Bible lessons for children to enjoy.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Whirl
programme.desc: A cartoon series about the loveable, enthusiastic kids of First Second Church. In each episode, the kids tackle a different theme that is central to Christian values. Everything from generosity and forgiveness to doubt.

programme.title: Lessons From The Bible
programme.desc: Join Pastor Doug, Dusty, Amelia and all the characters as they learn about the Bible and how it applies to daily life. Games, songs, and some silly puppets will inspire kids to follow along and get into God's Word!

programme.title: Deditos
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in 3 minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome. It's the Blello Show! Let's go!

programme.title: Arise Kids TV
programme.desc: ARISE Kids TV is jam packed full of faith and fun delivered by your favourite friends! Arise Kids TV believes in the next generation aims to inspire, connect and empower kids to follow Jesus and love life.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner, his mum. She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom somehow seem to save the day.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: An exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists. The award-winning artists are a mix of new and established faces, who share the vision of expressing their faith.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Allie & Kels get cheesy with a very dairy loaded episode.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Jesus Has Made The Finish Line Your Starting Post
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis travels from Alaska to Argentina relying on the kindness of strangers and surprising unsuspecting good Samaritans with life-changing gifts!

programme.title: Alaska Missionaries
programme.desc: Missionaries, doing real work, helping people in remote parts of Alaska. With breathtaking scenery, adventurous landscapes and down to earth personalities, this Alaskan show just might become your family favourite.

programme.title: Woodlawn
programme.desc: It's 1973, and a high school footballer in a newly desegregated school battles racial tensions on and off the field.

programme.title: Love on Iceland
programme.desc: Searching for a podcast idea, Chloe heads on a trip to Iceland with her friends. She doesn't expect to run into her ex, but spending more time together results in new beginnings for them both.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Give Me an Answer
programme.desc: Exploring answers to life's most difficult questions and recorded on college campus across the United States, Cliffe Knechtle engages with students and professors, to give real answers to questions about Christianity.

programme.title: The Perfect Bride
programme.desc: She's a bridal boot camp leader, he's a wedding photographer. They meet and have fun talking, she doesn't know he's engaged, he doesn't realise she thinks he's available. His fiancee joins her class.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.desc: Everyone likes to jam out to our favorite song on the radio. Thanks to the efforts of Samuel Morse and Reginald Fessenden - this became a possibility.

programme.title: The Divine Adventure
programme.desc: Are you looking for God's best for your life? Do you have a plan for getting there? Deeply practical and intensely personal, The Divine Adventure unpacks 12 powerful spiritual disciplines that will deepen your intimacy with God.

programme.title: I See You
programme.desc: Follows the work of CBM in Nepal. I See You introduces Lyn Wake, a passionate supporter and CBM ambassador as she travels to the remote southeastern corner of Nepal, far off the beaten Himalayan tourist track.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: A Book That Will Change Your Life
programme.desc: During this special Turning Point event, filmed at Madison Square Garden in New York City, discover how the Bible will change your life.

programme.title: Planetshakers
programme.sub-title: There is Power in The Blood
programme.desc: Join Planetshakers for their church service in Melbourne. A fresh Word with praise and worship each week. Live empowered.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: Shifting Gears
programme.desc: As her family's workshop faces a buyout, mechanic Jess enters a high-stakes motor show - only to find her ex is her biggest competition, and maybe her second chance.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.sub-title: The Real Meaning of the Cross
programme.desc: The four dimensions of the cross: breadth, length, height, and depth describes God's love for us. Luke 23 (Hartford 1985).

programme.title: Her Pen Pal
programme.desc: Event planner Victoria can't wait to attend, and plan, her best friend's Paris wedding. But when she finds out that her ex is bringing a date, she reconnects with her French childhood pen pal. Stars Mallory Jansen, Joshua Sasse.

programme.title: Plus One at an Amish Wedding
programme.desc: A busy young doctor receives a surprise when her boyfriend changes their plans to go to on a romantic trip Paris for an invitation to his brothers wedding - in Amish Country.

programme.title: The Dive
programme.desc: Two sisters go diving at a remote location. One of the sisters is struck, leaving her trapped 28 meters below. With low levels of oxygen and it is up to her sister to save her life.

programme.title: AfrAId
programme.desc: The Curtis family tests a new digital assistant, AIA, which learns their behaviours and anticipates needs. But AIA's protective nature means nothing, or no one, will interfere with them.

programme.title: The Killer
programme.desc: An assassin tries to make amends in an effort to restore the sight of a beautiful young singer.

programme.title: Gladiator II
programme.desc: After his home is conquered by the tyrannical emperors who now lead Rome, Lucius is forced to enter the Colosseum and must look to his past to find strength to return the glory of Rome to its people.

programme.title: Kraven the Hunter
programme.desc: Kraven's complex relationship with his ruthless father starts him down a path of vengeance, motivating him to become not only the greatest hunter in the world, but also one of its most feared.

programme.title: The Strangers: Chapter 1
programme.desc: When their car breaks down in an eerie small town, a couple must spend the night in a remote cabin. Panic ensues as they are terrorised by three masked strangers who strike with no mercy.

programme.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
programme.desc: The origin story of renegade warrior Furiosa before her encounter and teamup with Mad Max.

programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
programme.desc: The Bad Boys are back, but this time with a twist: Miami's finest are now on the run.

programme.title: Wolf Man
programme.desc: Blake and his family barricade themselves in a farmhouse after an unseen creature attacks. As the night unfolds, Blake transforms into a dangerous being, threatening his wife and daughter.

programme.title: The Beast Within
programme.desc: After witnessing her father undergo a terrible transformation, a 10-year-old girl becomes ensnared by the dark ancestral secret that her parents have so desperately tried to conceal.

programme.title: Spit
programme.desc: An ex-con returns to Australia after 20 years, gets detained, faces old enemies, makes new friends, and teaches his version of mateship while staying one step ahead.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Paul unites with Chani and the Fremen to seek revenge. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: Thelma
programme.desc: When 93-year-old Thelma Post gets duped by a phone scammer pretending to be her grandson, she sets out on a treacherous quest across the city to reclaim what was taken from her.

programme.title: Alexander
programme.desc: The towering, true story of Alexander the Great, who, in the 4th century BC, conquered Greece, Persia, Afghanistan and India - 90 percent of the 'known world'.

programme.title: Robin Hood (2010)
programme.desc: In an age of oppression and shameless tyranny, an outlaw becomes the unlikely hero that saves a nation and inspires generations to fight for freedom.
This film is a ferocious retelling of the ancient Battle of Thermopylae, depicting the titanic clash in which King Leonidas and 300 Spartans fought Xerxes and his massive Persian army to the death.

programme.title: Lawrence of Arabia
programme.desc: When TE Lawrence is attached to the British general staff in Arabia, he inspires the feuding Arabian chieftains to rebel against the Turks, leading to the birth of the Arabian kingdom.

programme.title: Kelly's Heroes
programme.desc: A classic comedy based around a group of WWII soldiers who plan to steal a treasure trove from the Nazis.

programme.title: Snow White and the Huntsman
programme.desc: In a twist to the fairy tale, the evil Queen Ravenna orders the Huntsman to capture Snow White so she can rule eternally; however, he trains her in the art of war to defeat the wicked ruler.

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programme.desc: Long before the evil Queen Ravenna was vanquished by Snow White's blade, she watched silently as her sister, Freya, suffered a heartbreaking betrayal and fled their kingdom.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers: D'artagnan
programme.desc: D'Artagnan arrives in Paris trying to find his attackers after being left for dead, which leads him to a real war where the future of France is at stake.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: Robin vows to avenge his father's death when he is murdered by the Sheriff of Nottingham.

programme.title: Dragonheart: Vengeance
programme.desc: After his family is killed, Lukas sets out on an epic quest for revenge, forming an unlikely trio with an ice breathing dragon and a swashbuckling mercenary.

programme.title: The Mummy (1999)
programme.desc: Archaeologists awaken an Egyptian priest mummified alive 36 centuries ago for killing Pharaoh Seti and sleeping with his mistress. When he escapes from the tomb, he becomes a threat to the world.

programme.title: Arthur Christmas
programme.desc: On Christmas night at the North Pole, Santa's youngest son looks to use his father's high-tech operation for an urgent mission.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Happily ever after will have to wait as Shrek, Princess Fiona, and Donkey visit the in-laws. Outraged that Fiona has wed an ogre, the King hires hit man Puss in Boots to make the problem disappear.

programme.title: An American Tail
programme.desc: Fievel the mouse travels from Russia to America with his family in the late 1800s to seek freedom from cat persecution.

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island
programme.desc: The journey begins when young adventurer Sean receives a coded distress signal from a mysterious island where no island should exist.

programme.title: Stuart Little 2
programme.desc: Stuart, the Little family's lonely mouse 'son', gets into strife by befriending a canary.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: A dapper koala who has fallen on hard times has one final chance to restore his crumbling theatre by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, is about to have a wild outdoor adventure.

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: When a cute alien lands on Earth and finds himself on the run from his own race, he forms an unlikely friendship with a brave little girl who's on a quest of her own.

programme.title: Chicken Run
programme.desc: A smooth-talking rooster crash-lands into a farm and attempts to help a group of chickens escape. With teamwork and a little bit of cluck, the fearless flock plots one last daring attempt for freedom.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Harold can bring anything in his book to life by drawing it. When he grows up and steps out of the book and into the real world, he realises he has much to learn.

programme.title: Captain Underpants: The First Epic Movie
programme.desc: George and Harold are BFFs who accidentally hypnotise their principal into believing he's the hero named Captain Underpants. They must stop a new teacher who is bent on ridding the world of laughter.

programme.title: Top Cat Begins
programme.desc: Poor, lonely and living on the streets, Top Cat meets Benny, a naive and good-hearted cat looking for adventure.

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: In a happy neighbourhood with picket fences and rose bushes sits a black house with a dead lawn. In the cellar is a hideout where a dastardly villain is plotting a huge heist - he wants to steal the moon!

programme.title: Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: Ace detective Harry Goodman goes missing, prompting his son Tim to find out what happened. Aiding the investigation is Harry's former Pokemon partner, Detective Pikachu.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (2010)
programme.desc: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

programme.title: Aquaman
programme.desc: The origin story of half-human, half-Atlantean Arthur Curry takes him on the journey of his lifetime - to discover whether he is worthy of who he was born to be: a king.

programme.title: Sucker Punch
programme.desc: A young woman incarcerated in a psychiatric institution against her will creates a fantastical world within her imagination to help her and four other inmates escape from a frightening fate.

programme.title: Snitch
programme.desc: In the fast-paced action thriller, a father goes undercover as an informant and infiltrates a drug cartel on a dangerous mission risking everything to save his son from going to prison.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: When an attempt to take down a drug cartel blows up in their faces, two undercover operatives are forced to go on the run together, though neither knows that the other is a federal agent.

programme.title: Reindeer Games
programme.desc: Just released from prison, all Rudy wants is to start a new life with Ashley, the girl of his dreams, but between them and happiness stands her crazy brother and his motley crew of deadly criminals.

programme.title: Snakes on a Plane
programme.desc: FBI agent Flynn has to transport a witness, but as the plane reaches 30,000 feet, hundreds of deadly snakes are released, causing violent mayhem.

programme.title: Hypnotic
programme.desc: Determined to find his missing daughter, Austin detective Danny Rourke finds himself spiralling down a rabbit hole while investigating a series of reality-bending bank robberies.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: The plan was flawless. The execution was perfect. Charlie Croker pulled off the crime of a lifetime.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: Rick O'Connell returns to combat a long-entombed emperor who threatens to plunge the world into his merciless service, with the chase going from Shanghai to high into the Himalayas.

programme.title: King Kong (2005)
programme.desc: The leading lady in a movie is abducted as a sacrifice for a giant ape in this jaw-dropping, triple Oscar-winning remake of the 1933 classic.

programme.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: Seeking revenge for his father's death, Black Manta uses the Black Trident's power to become a formidable foe. To defend Atlantis, Aquaman must forge an alliance with his imprisoned brother.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: Humans come to realise that their new war against the Autobots could end with their own extinction when a threat more powerful than anything they have ever imagined presents itself.

programme.title: A Very Harold & Kumar Christmas
programme.desc: Following years of growing apart, Harold and Kumar embark on another ill-advised journey through NYC, where their search takes them through party heaven, and almost blows Christmas Eve sky-high.

programme.title: Hot Fuzz
programme.desc: A big-city cop is reassigned to an idyllic, quiet town. But his dull existence is interrupted by suspicious accidents.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Four unlucky in love friends who make a pact: lose their virginity by prom night. Manipulating their way into the hearts of some of their classmates, their plans often backfire with hilarity.

programme.title: American Pie: The Wedding
programme.desc: Stifler takes centre stage in the funniest - and grossest - sequel. Jim finally proposes to Michelle, but nothing goes smoothly in this finale which will keep die-hard Pie eaters coming back.

programme.title: Mr. Bean's Holiday
programme.desc: Mr Bean can't believe his luck when he wins a camcorder and an all-expense paid holiday to the French Riviera. But during his journey to the south, he falls face first into a series of mishaps.

programme.title: Zombieland
programme.desc: The most frightened guy on Earth leads a motley crew of survivors in a world overrun by zombies.

programme.title: Fun With Dick And Jane (2005)
programme.desc: A couple who lose their minds whilst trying to hold onto the elusive American dream, turn to crime to get back in the black and outwit a greedy, corporate executive.

programme.title: Fun Mom Dinner
programme.desc: Four mums, whose only common ground is their kids' preschool class, get together for a dinner. The night begins as a disaster, but they have more in common than they thought.

programme.title: Boy
programme.desc: A hoodlum father comes home to his son, who had created an elaborate myth around his dad's disappearance.

programme.desc: Armed with proton packs and a new range of kick-ass weapons, the Ghostbusters battle to save the city from an uprising of mischievous ghouls.

programme.desc: Do you ever get tired of what you're doing? Today on the program, Joyce discusses why it's so important to do the right thing, with a right attitude that honours God.

programme.title: Secrets of Sacred Architecture
programme.desc: Throughout history, sacred buildings represented the greatest feats of innovative engineering & artistic design. Unlock the elements that make these structures so fascinating and unveil the meaning in religious architecture across the USA.

programme.title: Overcomer
programme.desc: Life changes overnight for Coach Harrison when his basketball team and championship dreams are crushed under the weight of unexpected news. Then he meets an aspiring athlete who's pushing her limits on a journey toward discovery.

programme.title: The Perfect Bride
programme.desc: She's a bridal boot camp leader, he's a wedding photographer. They meet and have fun talking, she doesn't know he's engaged, he doesn't realise she thinks he's available. His fiancee joins her class.

programme.title: Red Dust Challenge
programme.desc: A team of experienced disaster response volunteers, powered by mateship and determination, ride bicycles across the Simpson Desert to raise money for Australian charity Global Care, while lockdowns threaten to derail their adventure.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Jesus Has Made The Finish Line Your Starting Post
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.sub-title: Living as Impacters in the Modern World Part 2
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. Be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as 'Songs of Praise' travels throughout the British Isles and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Nothing is Impossible
programme.desc: Scott Beck's life has not gone to plan, working as the janitor at the high school where he was once the star of the basketball team. But opportunity arises when the local team holds open tryouts.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.sub-title: Don't Let It In: Guarding Your Mind with God's Thoughts
programme.desc: Pastor Bobby Schuller provides spiritual principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In part 1 of The Prayer of Jabez, Pastor Bayless unpacks two of Jabez's requests, sharing what it truly means to ask for God's blessing and how He wants to expand your life for His glory.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: Has Your Get Up & Go Got Up & Gone? - Part 2
programme.desc: Find out how to reignite your passion and transform your life as Joyce shares powerful insights on the importance of stirring yourself up, as well as those around you.

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Join us for a musical celebration of life and faith as 'Songs of Praise' travels throughout the British Isles and the world presenting soul stirring hymns and touching stories of inspiration.

programme.title: Nothing is Impossible
programme.desc: Scott Beck's life has not gone to plan, working as the janitor at the high school where he was once the star of the basketball team. But opportunity arises when the local team holds open tryouts.

programme.title: Dealing with Depression
programme.desc: Dealing with Depression aims to provide a gift for those dealing with depression, anxiety, panic attacks, and really tough times. He sings songs and reads scriptures to provide hope, comfort, love and help.

programme.title: Praise, Prayer and Preaching
programme.desc: The heart of the weekly teaching at Wesley Mission Sydney is the Sunday night experience in the Wesley Theatre. Be part of the weekly service with Rev Keith Garner as he shares with his congregation a message from the bible.

programme.title: To the Moon and Back
programme.desc: The Postables embark on a road trip to locate a talented young singer/songwriter hiding from her past. As they track down and reunite the family, Oliver receives a box of letters from his father to help prepare him.

programme.title: Thelma
programme.desc: When 93-year-old Thelma Post gets duped by a phone scammer pretending to be her grandson, she sets out on a treacherous quest across the city to reclaim what was taken from her.

programme.title: Piece by Piece
programme.desc: LEGO bricks tell the life story of singer, songwriter and record producer Pharrell Williams - from his childhood in Virginia to his success in the music and fashion industry.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: In Oz, two clashing witches, Elphaba and Glinda, form an unlikely friendship. Elphaba, wrongly labeled wicked, seeks to expose the corrupt Wizard ruling the land.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr, who's intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down, when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: The untold origin story of Optimus Prime and Megatron, better known as sworn enemies, but who once were friends bonded like brothers.

programme.title: Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire
programme.desc: Godzilla and the almighty Kong face a colossal threat hidden deep within the planet, challenging their very existence and the survival of the human race.

programme.title: Wolf Man
programme.desc: Blake and his family barricade themselves in a farmhouse after an unseen creature attacks. As the night unfolds, Blake transforms into a dangerous being, threatening his wife and daughter.

programme.title: The Convert
programme.desc: A preacher's violent past is drawn into question and his faith tested as he becomes caught up in a bloody war between Maori tribes after arriving at a British settlement in the 1830s.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Anora, a Brooklyn sex worker, marries an oligarch's son. But when the news reaches Russia, his parents rush to New York to have the marriage annulled, threatening her fairytale.

programme.title: Spin the Bottle
programme.desc: A group of friends plays spin the bottle in a house marked by a massacre, unleashing an evil spirit. As they die in terrifying ways, the survivors must uncover the house's dark secrets.

programme.title: River Wild
programme.desc: A thrill-seeking trip quickly turns into a desperate fight for survival when white-water rafters become stranded in raging rapids, and someone seems intent on sabotage to ensure secrets stay buried.

programme.title: MaXXXine
programme.desc: Adult film star and aspiring actress Maxine Minx finally gets her big break. However, as a mysterious killer stalks the starlets of LA, a trail of blood threatens to reveal her sinister past.

programme.title: Abigail
programme.desc: A group of would-be criminals kidnaps the 12-year-old daughter of a powerful underworld figure. Their plan starts to unravel when they discover their young captive is no normal little girl.

programme.title: The Mummy (1999)
programme.desc: Archaeologists awaken an Egyptian priest mummified alive 36 centuries ago for killing Pharaoh Seti and sleeping with his mistress. When he escapes from the tomb, he becomes a threat to the world.

programme.title: First Blood
programme.desc: When a small town police chief arrests John Rambo, he must make a daring escape and prepare himself for a one man war.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: After years of fighting in the Crusades, Robin of Loxley returns to find his estate destroyed and his neighbours impoverished, all thanks to the Sheriff of Nottingham.

programme.title: 300: Rise of an Empire
programme.desc: When a Persian God-King leads his troops into battle against the legendary Greeks, the only possible outcome is bloody and brutal.

programme.title: Troy
programme.desc: For the love of a beautiful woman a city will burn to the ground. An epic tale of honour, war, forbidden passion and the towering Trojan Horse.

programme.title: Alexander
programme.desc: The towering, true story of Alexander the Great, who, in the 4th century BC, conquered Greece, Persia, Afghanistan and India - 90 percent of the 'known world'.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: Forced into slavery by the corrupt heir to the throne, Roman general Maximus becomes a gladiator. His prowess in the arena leads him to Rome, the Colosseum, and a showdown with the new emperor.

programme.title: Gladiator II
programme.desc: After his home is conquered by the tyrannical emperors who now lead Rome, Lucius is forced to enter the Colosseum and must look to his past to find strength to return the glory of Rome to its people.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers - Part II: Milady
programme.desc: Constance Bonacieux is kidnapped before D'Artagnan's very eyes. The young musketeer, aided by Athos, Porthos and Aramis, is forced to join the mysterious Milady de Winter.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: Rick O'Connell returns to combat a long-entombed emperor who threatens to plunge the world into his merciless service, with the chase going from Shanghai to high into the Himalayas.

programme.title: Robin Hood (2010)
programme.desc: In an age of oppression and shameless tyranny, an outlaw becomes the unlikely hero that saves a nation and inspires generations to fight for freedom.
This film is a ferocious retelling of the ancient Battle of Thermopylae, depicting the titanic clash in which King Leonidas and 300 Spartans fought Xerxes and his massive Persian army to the death.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (2010)
programme.desc: Dre, a young boy, finds himself bullied by Cheng, a rebellious kung fu prodigy at his school. However, things change after he befriends Mr Han, a maintenance man, who happens to be a kung fu expert.

programme.title: Scoob!
programme.desc: With hundreds of cases solved and adventures shared, Scooby and the gang face their most challenging mystery ever: a plot to unleash the ghost dog Cerberus upon the world.

programme.title: Bookworm
programme.desc: Mildred's world is turned upside down when her estranged father, comes to look after her and agrees to take her camping to find the mythological beast, the Canterbury Panther.

programme.title: Nanny McPhee & The Big Bang
programme.desc: Nanny McPhee helps a stressed young mother trying to run the family farm while her husband is away at war.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: When a Peruvian bear travels to London in search of a home, he finds himself lost and alone at Paddington Station. This charming family comedy is based on the classic children's books.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: Set in the mythical world of burly Vikings and fire-breathing dragons, a Viking teenager takes in an injured dragon and sees an opportunity to set his tribe on a new course.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: After discovering an ice cave that is home to hundreds of new types of dragons, Hiccup and Toothless find themselves at the centre of a battle to prevent a costly war across their land.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon: Hidden World
programme.desc: What began as an unlikely friendship between an adolescent Viking and a fearsome Night Fury dragon has become an epic adventure spanning their lives.

programme.title: Christmas with the Kranks
programme.desc: Fed up with the commercial aspects of Christmas, the Kranks decide to skip Christmas this year and forgo the gifts, the tree, the decorations and to spend the dollars saved on a Caribbean cruise.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four high school kids discover an old video game console and are immediately drawn into the game's jungle setting, learning you don't just play Jumanji, you must survive it.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: As they return to Jumanji to rescue one of their own, nothing is as they expect. They will have to brave parts unknown and unexplored to escape the world's most dangerous game.

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: Curse Of Were-Rabbit
programme.desc: Wallace and his loyal dog, Gromit, set out to discover the mystery behind the garden sabotage that plagues their village and threatens the annual giant vegetable growing contest.

programme.title: The Pirates Who Don't Do Anything
programme.desc: Those vege-eating boys are back! This time they're cabin boys in a pirate theatre and are called upon to put aside their lazy, cowardly ways and help a princess rescue her brother who's been kidnapped.

programme.title: Tad The Lost Explorer
programme.desc: Due to a fortuitous mix-up, Tad, a dreamy construction worker, is mistaken for a famous archaeologist and sent on an expedition to Peru.

programme.title: Grand-Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: When Frank Collins suffers from writer's block, he decides to start a day care for his father-in-law and other seniors as a way to make quick cash.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: Humans come to realise that their new war against the Autobots could end with their own extinction when a threat more powerful than anything they have ever imagined presents itself.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: A secret agent is sent to Sydney to find and destroy a genetically modified disease called Chimera.

programme.title: Hard Kill
programme.desc: When a billionaire tech CEO hires a team of mercenaries to protect a lethal piece of technology, the mission becomes high risk when his daughter is kidnapped by a terrorist group.

programme.title: Machete
programme.desc: Left for dead after clashing with notorious Mexican drug kingpin Torrez, Machete escapes to Texas, looking to disappear and forget his tragic past. What he finds is a web of corruption and deceit.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: Street-smart Nathan Drake is recruited by seasoned treasure hunter Victor 'Sully' Sullivan to recover a fortune amassed by Ferdinand Magellan, and lost 500 years ago.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Miami cops, Marcus Burnett and Mike Lowrey, have 72 hours to find $100 million worth of heroin that was stolen from the basement of police headquarters.

programme.title: The Town
programme.desc: A bank robber falls in love with a former robbery hostage and decides he wants out of the life. With the Feds closing in he must choose: betray his friends or lose the woman he loves.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout
programme.desc: On a dangerous assignment, Ethan chooses to save his team over completing the mission, allowing nuclear weapons to fall into the wrong hands. The IMF team must stop the fallout.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 6
programme.desc: Hobbs has been tracking an organisation of lethally skilled drivers. The only way to stop the criminal mercenaries from stealing a top-secret weapon is to outmatch them at street level.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 7
programme.desc: The lead-footed crew reunites in this turbo-fuelled tale of the vengeful brother of an international terrorist who sets his bloody sights on the boy racers that took his sibling down.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: The re-resurrected mummy of an Egyptian high priest kidnaps the son of archaeologists who first dug him up, and sets out to destroy mankind by commanding the army of the ancient Scorpion King.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
programme.desc: The web-spinning superhero must battle his own demons and a barrage of new villains including Sandman and Venom.

programme.title: Hummingbird

programme.title: Pineapple Express

programme.title: Holmes & Watson

programme.desc: Armed with proton packs and a new range of kick-ass weapons, the Ghostbusters battle to save the city from an uprising of mischievous ghouls.

programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.title: Darwin's Amazing Animals
programme.desc: The Oriental Stork is making a comeback. Experts have reintroduced it to Japan and expanded its breeding range. This episode examines what it takes to bring a species back from extinction.

programme.title: Time-lapse Journey
programme.desc: Seto Inland Sea is the largest body of water of its kind in Japan. See the sights of the Great Seto Bridge and the shallow coastal waters through time-lapse photography.

programme.title: Viewpoint Science
programme.desc: The proactive science education program which encourages primary and lower secondary school children to discover and investigate the mysteries which puzzle them.

programme.title: Story Land
programme.desc: Leading actors take turns as solo storytellers to act and recite traditional folk tales loved in Japan for centuries. Watch out, too, for the delightful illustrations!

programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan
programme.desc: The Sanriku Coast was the area hardest hit by the massive earthquake and tsunami of 2011. Its restored communities are rediscovering their local traditions and the unique beauty of this landscape.

programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.title: Face to Face
programme.desc: World-renowned gallerist Tomio Koyama helped launch the careers of artists Takashi Murakami and Yoshitomo Nara. He shares his unique approach and his vision for the future of Japan's art scene.

programme.title: BOSAI
programme.desc: Phase Free is a disaster preparedness concept that does not distinguish between everyday life and emergency situations. We'll see how everyday items can be used in times of disaster as well.

programme.title: Design Museum Japan
programme.desc: Tsukamoto Yoshiharu (Architect) visits Nara. Long ago, people in Nara preserved ice by building an icehouse on a mountain ridge, showing how architecture can make use of natural characteristics.

programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.title: Japanese Armor: Beauty in Defence
programme.desc: Iconic Japanese armor, worn for defense. 16th-century helmets featured outlandish shapes like a giant crescent moon or the ears of a rabbit. Behind its creation, we uncover the spirit of the samurai.

programme.title: My Street Piano
programme.desc: On the 4th floor of a terminal inside Chubu Centrair International Airport sits a white piano, which passersby love to visit and play from the heart.

programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Voices from the Battle of Saipan
programme.desc: Eighty years after the Battle of Saipan, a collection of battlefield interviews with US soldiers has been uncovered. Their voices tell the story of one of the most brutal chapters of the war.

programme.title: To the Moon and Back

programme.title: The Fatherless Epidemic
programme.desc: A short documentary addressing one of the most pressing issue in Western society - The Fatherless Epidemic. While everyone attempts to solve societal ills by treating symptoms, the church is being called to fight the issue at its roots.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Jesus Has Made The Finish Line Your Starting Post Pt 2 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn! One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner his mum! She knows more about shopping than solving crime.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries

programme.title: Border Security: Australia's Front Line
programme.desc: Elderly Australians unknowingly smuggle drugs for a friend. A South African breakdancer's plans are uncovered. Biosecurity catches a Vietnamese couple with restricted goods.

programme.title: Judge Judy

programme.title: Bondi Vet

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics

programme.title: Bondi Rescue

programme.title: The Exchange

programme.title: US Closing Bell

programme.title: Hot Pursuit! 24 Hours of Le Mans
programme.desc: From the midnight pit stops to the sunrise battles, Matt Miller and Hannah Elliott take you into the driver's seat with CEOs, racing legends and the brands competing for the Le Mans edge.

programme.sub-title: The Big Business of Drilling Deep Into the Earth

programme.sub-title: The Commanders DC Deal with Josh Harris

programme.desc: David Rubenstein sits down with Maverick Capital Founder, Lee Ainslie, to talk about his investing strategies and tactics.

programme.title: Bloomberg Originals
programme.desc: Explores every angle of climate change, technology, finance, sports and beyond. Bloomberg Originals is business as you've never seen it.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, hosted by David Westin in New York.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: Your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. Hosted by Yvonne Man and David Ingles.

programme.desc: The definitive guide for global news audiences to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day, through probing interviews and nuanced conversations.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: Links the market drivers from overnight in the US and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep dive analysis of the top business, energy and geopolitical stories.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: Live from London, we catch you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. Plus, we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The Opening Trade
programme.desc: Everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. We break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to guests with skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson, and Kriti Gupta.

programme.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, finance and politics. We go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

programme.title: Bloomberg Brief
programme.desc: Delivering the market news, data and analysis you need to set your agenda.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Daily conversations with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. Hosted by Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern.

programme.title: Bloomberg Tech

programme.title: Bloomberg ETF IQ
programme.desc: This program focuses on the opportunities, risks and trends tied to the trillions of dollars in the global exchange traded funds industry. Hosted by Matt Miller, Katie Greifeld and Eric Balchunas.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets
programme.desc: Focuses on bringing you the most important global business and breaking market news and information as it happens.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Bloomberg Balance of Power focuses on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: Bloomberg Businessweek
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring you reporting from the magazine that helps global leaders stay ahead, plus insight on the people, companies and trends shaping the current complex economy.

programme.title: Bloomberg Markets: The Close
programme.desc: Romaine Bostick and Scarlet Fu own the market-moving breaking news around the closing bell in this must-watch daily program to get an edge on equities, earnings and the economy.

programme.title: Manben: Behind the Scenes of Manga
programme.desc: Witness a manga brought to life! This episode features a master of mystery, Morohoshi Daijiro. Step into his one-of-a-kind office, filled with mysterious stories and bones? Watch to find out more!

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan
programme.desc: A ride from one edge to the other of Japan's smallest prefecture, where a relative scarcity of natural resources has been historically offset by an unrelenting drive to create outstanding quality.

programme.title: Story Land in Classical Japanese
programme.desc: This program presents masterpieces of classical Japanese literature in both their original forms and modern translations, with easy-to-understand imagery that conveys the worldview of ancient Japan.

programme.title: Take Tech
programme.desc: A program for upper primary to lower secondary school children to explore the everyday technologies all around them. Each episode takes a piece of familiar tech to find out what it does and how.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: J-Melo
programme.desc: Experience the cutting edge of Japanese entertainment as we turn the spotlight on virtual artists. This week, the first virtual singer to play the Budokan: KAF.

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: Little Charo is an animation series about a Japanese dog who got lost in NY. "I want to see my owner again!" Charo starts his adventure back home. Season 1-20.

programme.title: Japanology Plus Mini
programme.desc: Japanology Plus explores Japanese life and culture. In this 5-minute digest, we look at tatami mats: a quintessentially Japanese flooring material.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.desc: See a kitty hard at work guarding a local specialty, dried bonito! Visit a restaurant that uses the ingredient in its curries, then head to the coast with kitty BFFs.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Ninja Truth
programme.desc: The arrival of guns in Japan changed the face of warfare. We examine the ninja's use of firearms, particularly in one famous assassination attempt, and the concealed guns they're said to have used.

programme.title: Core Kyoto Mini
programme.desc: Kyoto has about 2,700 temples that hold an array of Buddhist statues. Sculptors breathe life into these objects of worship.

programme.title: Easy Japanese for Work
programme.desc: Today: reporting to a superior that a coworker is ill. Tran Dinh Thang works at a construction firm in Kanagawa. In a roleplay challenge, he must report to a superior that a coworker has become ill.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Flowers color life's important moments but are all too quickly discarded. Kawashima Haruka dries discarded flowers, giving them new purpose, ensuring they're cherished to the end.

programme.title: Somewhere Street

programme.title: Direct Talk

programme.title: Where We Call Home
programme.desc: We meet Polish Izabela Ishikawa who works to find and return the remains of those who died during World War II in Okinawa, and Hongkonger Wan Sze Ho, an instructor at a driving school in Kumamoto.

programme.desc: Learn how to make the most of your Japanese skills. Watch our drama that features useful communication strategies, our snappy videos about onomatopoeia, and our documentaries on "senpai" in Japan.

programme.desc: Across America, street racers battle their rivals for cash. In Missouri, there's an elimination tournament, and Michigan rivals hold a grudge match.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Locals Only
programme.desc: Locals face off in the finale to see which track wins, then the champ takes on small-tire legend Boosted GT, Chris Hamilton's Mustang is no easy match.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation
programme.desc: Innovative spins on the classic grilled cheese sandwich; a veritable sushi bar on wheels with fresh tuna and wagyu beef and fresh funnel cake and ice cream.

programme.title: The Blacklist
programme.desc: Red and Dembe go to great lengths to fulfil the final wishes of a dear friend; Aram goes undercover as an interpreter to a company that provides services to criminals.

programme.title: The Blacklist
programme.desc: The Task Force must race to stop simultaneous dangers presented by two Blacklisters. Cooper approaches a congressman for intel.

programme.title: The Blacklist
programme.desc: The Task Force investigate the apparent disappearance of a defence contractor. Cooper receives an unexpected offer and Red makes a connection.

programme.title: The Blacklist
programme.desc: The task force are thrown for a loop when they encounter a nefarious enterprise that provides doppelgangers for criminals. Red scrambles to counteract a bold move by Liz.

programme.title: The Blacklist
programme.desc: Red and Dembe land in peril when Townsend deploys a torture specialist who uses unorthodox methods to interrogate her victims.

programme.title: The Blacklist
programme.desc: The task force attempt to stop an abduction by searching for a treasure man who uses geocaching to hide illicit goods and facilitate transactions between otherwise warring criminal factions.

programme.title: The Blacklist

programme.desc: Red enjoys a quiet visit with a friend at her home in rural America.

programme.desc: In a retrospective look at key turning points, steps are retraced that lead Elizabeth Keen to align with a powerful enemy.

programme.desc: Liz and the Task Force track new leads in their investigation of N-13, while Red takes steps to infiltrate Townsend's criminal organisation.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family's cross-country drive to the Walley World theme park proves to be harder than they ever anticipated.

programme.title: Junior

programme.title: Wayne's World
programme.desc: Wayne and Garth host the biggest show on local public access TV. Now a sleazy network executive wants to produce a big-budget version. With the help of Wayne's girlfriend, they must battle to save the show.

programme.title: The Naked Gun
programme.desc: Incompetent detective Frank Drebin has to foil an attempt to assassinate the Queen as he woos Priscilla Presley.

programme.title: The Jackal
programme.desc: An FBI director works with a Russian agent and a jailed terrorist to hunt down the elusive Jackal, a master-of-disguise assassin on a deadly mission.

programme.title: Up In Smoke
programme.desc: In this hilarious comedy, two free-spirited pot-heads decide to join forces in their endles search for substances to snort, smoke, or drop. This is the first film in the Cheech and Chong series.

programme.title: Memphis Belle

programme.desc: Four people considering ending their own lives suddenly find a little sunshine when they come together on New Year's Eve.

programme.title: Le Week-End
programme.desc: A long-married couple revisit Paris for a long weekend for the first time since their honeymoon, in hopes of rekindling their relationship - or, perhaps, to bring it to an end.

programme.title: On a Clear Day

programme.title: Macbeth
programme.desc: After murdering the King of Scotland and taking the throne, Macbeth begins to unravel as he becomes consumed with paranoia and guilt.

programme.title: The Deep Blue Sea
programme.desc: An adaptation of the 1952 Terence Rattigan play The Deep Blue Sea about the wife of a Judge who engages in an affair with a former RAF pilot.

programme.title: The Descent
programme.desc: A caving trip goes wrong, trapping a group of women. Stalked by bloodthirsty beasts and turning against each other, they must become as savage as the creatures hunting them.

programme.title: Love and Friendship
programme.desc: A beautiful young widow visits her in-laws' estate while waiting for social chatter about her personal indiscretions to pass.

programme.desc: Carrie Bradshaw, a successful author, and her fashion icon friends continue to juggle jobs and relationships while navigating motherhood, marriage and Manhattan real estate.

programme.title: The Boy Next Door
programme.desc: A newly separated teacher gives in to temptation when the handsome teenager next door attempts to seduce her. But trouble ensues when she tries to end the relationship.

programme.title: Hairspray
programme.desc: Its 1962 - the '50s are out and change is in the air. Tracey Turnblad, a big girl with big hair and an even bigger heart who only has one passion - dancing - wins a spot on a local TV dance program.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: In the steamy second chapter of the best-selling blockbuster, a wounded Christian tries to entice a cautious Ana back into his life.

programme.title: Just Go with It
programme.desc: Danny Maccabee meets the girl of his dreams but has to ask his loyal assistant to pretend to be his soon-to-be ex-wife in order to cover up a lie.

programme.title: Here and Now
programme.desc: A singer in New York gets a grim diagnosis that puts her life and dreams into perspective.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Two Manhattanites plot against each other in a cross-purpose love affair that is meant to be over in 10 days, but might just last a lifetime.

programme.title: Duplicity
programme.desc: Two sexy spies-turned-corporate operatives find themselves on either side of an all-out corporate war, even though they are having an affair.

programme.title: The Great Escaper
programme.desc: Bernard Jordan, a World War II veteran, sneaks out of his care home to attend the 70th anniversary commemoration of the D-Day landings in Normandy.

programme.title: Last Night In Soho
programme.desc: Edgar Wright's psychological thriller follows a young woman mysteriously able to enter the glamorous 1960s, where the dreams of the past splinter into something darker.

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: Fourteen years after being imprisoned, vicious psychopath Max Cady emerges with a single-minded mission: to seek revenge on his attorney Sam Bowden.

programme.title: The Taking of Pelham 1 2 3
programme.desc: A New York City subway dispatcher's ordinary day is thrown into chaos by an audacious crime: the hijacking of a subway train buy a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Schindler's List
programme.desc: The true story of Nazi party member Oskar Schindler, who saved the lives of more than 1100 Jews during the Holocaust.

programme.title: Inferno
programme.desc: When Robert Langdon wakes up in an Italian hospital with amnesia, he teams up with Dr Sienna Brooks, and together they must race across Europe against the clock to foil a deadly global plot.

programme.title: One Life
programme.desc: The incredible true story of British humanitarian Nicholas Winton, who helps save hundreds of Central European children from the Nazis on the eve of World War II.

programme.title: The Frozen Ground
programme.desc: The incredible true story that follows an Alaskan State Trooper as he sets out to end the murderous rampage of a serial killer who has gone unnoticed for 13 years.

programme.title: Se7en
programme.desc: Two cops track a brilliant and elusive killer who orchestrates a string of horrific murders.

programme.title: Children of Men
programme.desc: It's 2027. There have been no births for 18 years. Humanity is doomed. Then Clive Owen discovers the key to survival, but can he protect his precious cargo?

programme.title: Up In Smoke
programme.desc: In this hilarious comedy, two free-spirited pot-heads decide to join forces in their endles search for substances to snort, smoke, or drop. This is the first film in the Cheech and Chong series.

programme.title: Memphis Belle
programme.desc: In 1943, the crew of a B-17 based in the UK prepares for its 25th and final bombing mission over Germany before returning home to the USA.

programme.title: Operation Petticoat
programme.desc: During World War II, a commander finds himself stuck with a decrepit (and pink) submarine, a con man executive officer, and a group of army nurses.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Christmas Vacation
programme.desc: The Griswold family's plans for a big family Christmas predictably turn into a big disaster.

programme.title: Tango & Cash
programme.desc: Two narcotics detectives can't stand each other. When a crime lord frames them for murder, they have to buddy up to clear their names and put him away.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: A trio of university parapsychologists decide to open their own business called Ghostbusters, and almost at once are summoned to investigate the strange happenings in a Central Park West apartment.

programme.title: Dead Calm
programme.desc: A couple rescues a half-delirious sole survivor of a crippled schooner, but soon the stranger will plunge the unwary pair into an intense battle of cat and mouse. And life or death.

programme.title: Out of Africa
programme.desc: Karen Blixen establishes a plantation in wild and untamed Africa, which is now being threatened by an ensuing war between rival native tribes.

programme.title: The Big Chill
programme.desc: Friends compare their '60s ideas with the harsh reality of their lives in the '80s, and discover that in a cold world, you need your friends to keep you warm.

programme.title: Easy Rider
programme.desc: Two drugged-out bike riders and a spaced-out lawyer go on an odyssey in search of the real America only to find violence and bigotry.

programme.title: Morning Show Mystery: Mortal Mishaps
programme.desc: Billie Blessings has gone from beloved chef, restaurant owner and morning show segment host to the prime suspect in a murder case when one of the executives at the network dies from poisoning.

programme.title: The Client List
programme.desc: In Odessa, Texas, a young housewife becomes one of the city's most popular hookers until she, her co-workers and 68 prominent residents are arrested in a scandal that rocks the city.

programme.title: Ike: Countdown to D-Day
programme.desc: During the invasion by the Western Allied forces in Normandy, the Supreme Allied Commander executes the biggest military manoeuvre in the face of internal conflicts and tribulations.

programme.title: The Sweetest Heart
programme.desc: With help from a handsome banker, Maddie does everything she can to save her business. When her first love unexpectedly returns home, she must choose between a new romance and the man she never stopped loving.

programme.title: Christmas Eve in Miller's Point
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, a family gathers for what may be their last holiday in their ancestral home. As tensions rise, a teen sneaks out with friends to take over the wintry suburb for herself.

programme.title: The Princess and the Marine
programme.desc: Based on a true story about a US marine stationed in Bahrain who falls in love with a member of the Bahrain royal family.

programme.title: Killer Under the Bed
programme.desc: New to town, a bullied teenager discovers a doll, riddled with pins, in her backyard shed. She soon comes to believe that the doll holds supernatural powers.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Choc Chip Cookie
programme.desc: A baker in small-town Minnesota turns into an amateur detective after finding her friend and delivery driver shot to death behind her shop.

programme.title: Wedding Wars
programme.desc: In the midst of organising his brother Ben's wedding, Shel, a gay party planner, decides to go on strike for equal rights when he learns that Ben is behind a political speech against gay marriage.

programme.title: At Home in Mitford
programme.desc: Cynthia leaves Boston to spend time in her late uncle's small town in hopes of alleviating writer's block. She meets a man, and as the pair work together to help a boy, they find solace and romance.

programme.title: Philadelphia
programme.desc: An up-and-coming young lawyer sues his former employer for wrongful termination after he suspects his dismissal from his prestigious job may have been due to his contracting AIDS.

programme.title: Jesse Stone: Stone Cold
programme.desc: A series of strange murders sends shivers through a quiet New England town. It's up to a hard-as-nails police chief Jesse Stone to find the psychopath behind the savage crimes.

programme.desc: A former Los Angeles lawman becomes the new police chief of a small fishing town that holds dirty secrets.

programme.desc: A beautiful young widow visits her in-laws' estate while waiting for social chatter about her personal indiscretions to pass.

programme.title: My Generation

programme.desc: A tycoon's wife who falls for his protege before the Great War must endure an agonising wait to have him back.

programme.title: Suffragette

programme.title: Tommy's Honour

programme.title: A United Kingdom

programme.title: Tell it to the Bees
programme.desc: A shunned small-town doctor and beekeeper in post-war Britain befriends a struggling mother and son, helping them discover that love can be found in many forms.

programme.title: Tea with the Dames
programme.desc: Four old friends will reflect on their lives and careers, as they spend a weekend together at the retreat once shared by Joan Plowright and Laurence Olivier.

programme.title: Absolutely Anything
programme.desc: A group of aliens bestow upon a random Earthling the ability to make absolutely anything happen, to see if he uses the power for good or for evil.

programme.desc: The Dunder Mifflin staff have a Halloween costume contest. Michael's upset after Darryl gives an idea to corporate without running it by him first.
